lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you and what is this place?

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: I collect valuable resources and pawn off access to them to foolish adventurers, like yourself.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: You should take a look inside my arena. There's an abundance of valuable resources inside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And I can take whatever I want?

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: It's all yours. All I ask is you pay the upfront fee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will others be able to kill me inside?

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: Yes. These walls will only hold them back for so long.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: Haha! For the right price, I won't deny any one access to my arena. Even if their intention is to kill you.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: My arena holds many treasures that I've acquired at great expense, adventurer. Their bounty can come at a price.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: One day, adventurer, I will boast ownership of a much larger, much more dangerous arena than this. Take advantage of this offer while it lasts.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Mandrith
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.
